settings.question: What is the order cut-off time for same-day processing?
settings.answer: Orders placed before 4:00 PM (AEST) are processed the same day. Orders placed after 4:00 PM (AEST) are processed the next business day.

settings.question: How long does it take to process and ship my order?
settings.answer: Orders are typically processed within 1-3 business days (Monday - Friday). After shipping, delivery usually takes 4-7 business days (Monday–Friday).

settings.question: How long will it take to receive a refund after I return an item?
settings.answer: After we receive and inspect your returned item, the refund will be processed within 7 days to the original payment method.

settings.question: What should I do if I want to return my order outside the return period?
settings.answer: Returns must be initiated within 30 days of delivery. After 30 days, we are unable to accept returns.

settings.question: Are there any restocking fees for returns?
settings.answer: No, we do not charge restocking fees. You will be refunded in full once your return is processed and approved.
